description_long: This is a large, stately house surrounded by dense, mature trees on all sides, creating a sense of privacy and seclusion. The structure features a complex, multi-gabled roof with prominent chimneys and a mix of stone and siding on the exterior walls. The front facade is distinguished by a rounded bay window and a formal entryway, while the rear includes a covered porch and additional architectural detailing. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with several bay and standard rectangular windows visible. The house sits on a landscaped lot with a curved walkway leading to the main entrance, and the overall design suggests a blend of traditional and Victorian influences. The property is substantial in size, likely accommodating multiple rooms and living spaces across two stories.
description: A large, traditional house with a multi-gabled roof, stone and siding exterior, surrounded by mature trees and featuring bay windows and a formal entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded bay window, main entryway, and a curved walkway framed by dense trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, multiple windows, and the tree coverage partially obscuring the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a covered porch, additional bay window, and more asymmetrical window placement, with trees encircling the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the prominent chimneys, roof complexity, and dense tree line along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and standard rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Formal entryway with steps, a rounded bay window, and a small porch framed by landscaping and mature trees
